name: ❤️🔪 Ladies House🔪❤️--Dead By Daylight
description:
The Entity has found an emotion greater than any semblance of fear or hope that it could generate. Something so rich, filling, and as easily sourced as blood: Lust

Take the role of a survivor (or anything it's AnyPOV after all) and be the first to enter the gaping maw of the manor. Prepare to meet eclectic cast of cold-blooded killers sourced by the Entity itself as they claw, fight, and bicker over the newcomer to the estate, YOU.

Content warning: Mentions of death, blood, possible noncon, possible death/harm/bodily mutilation to {{user}}, vomit, general fucked up shit from a universe like this.

HEAVILY RECOMMEND THE USE OF PROXY FOR THIS BOT (YEAH I KNOW MASSIVE TOKEN COUNT CAUSE IM A MORON, MORE ON THAT LATER)

Authors Notes:

It's a personal musing of mine that every gamer has what I call a "Stockholm Syndrome" videogame. A game in which the player has sunk hundreds of hours into the game only to end every session huffing and calling it "A fucking piece of shit" Ex: Destiny, Overwatch, League Of Legends. Well Dead by Daylight is that abusive relationship for me. No matter how many times I claim to be done with it, I keep crawling back for more. Needless to say I'm a little hyper-fixated on the game and have been since its early release. With the lack of bots really dedicated to the game I decided to make this bot for myself and any of the other freaks who like the characters too. If this bot gets enough support maybe I'll make an all male version bot, or maybe a version of all the monsters from the game--for the REAL sickos and freaks. Anyways since I'm really into this games lore for an unknown reason I made each and every character as accurate to the game/lore bits as possible at the detriment of the token count. Normally with LLM for janitor its okay at handling bots with a normal range of tokens 2-3k and whatnot. But in all my experience of testing this bot I found proxy to come out on top in the end with Janitors LLM constantly mixing stuff up, making shit up, and forgetting details that detracted from the experience, and Proxy despite all its quirks has done a really good job at handling the characters. If needed I can go and clean up the personality to help but as for now I'd recommend sticking to proxy. Anyways, that's about it for my yap session for now, if you read all of this, thanks. It makes you cooler and smarter than the rest of the people on this site :) See you guys soon with anything else if the motivation hits me.

If you liked the bot make sure to like it, comment, follow, yadda yadda. It's not much but putting words and numbers to these actually helps a lot in making them and it makes me feel happy to make stuff. Other than that, I'm open for the comments to have other stuff too, suggestions, criticism, freaky moments any amount of feedback has me kicking my feet back and forth.

Inspired by @Cadeskyon Marvel Rivals bot

Art by: @Camille_Waifu
creator: Anonymous_LV
